channel.title: Diy on Lucaji
channel.description: Recent content in Diy on Lucaji

item.title: Diretta Iniezione
item.description: Audio preamplifier for dynamic microphones. Performs a FET input stage with high linearity and large bandwidth. XLR input with gain control and mini-jack 3.5mm line output.

item.title: Back To The Future alarm clock
item.description: A full working replica of the time machine circuits from the Back To The Future blockbuster. Apart from actual time travel, it acts as a talking alarm clock.

item.title: Theremin by lookaji
item.description: A mighty theremin build from an open source project with Arduino.

item.title: Tube Amps by lookaji
item.description: I built a series of tube amps tested at both at home and on the road that performed nicely.
